name: FTB Presents Direwolf20 1.21
description: Join Direwolf20 for an immersive Minecraft journey set in the minecraft 1.21 mod ecosystem. Brought to you by an FTB and Direwolf20 collaboration!

name: FTB Evolution
description: FTB Evolution re-imagines modded MC with a vast collection of advanced tech, intricate magic, and limitless exploration. Whether you're into building high-tech machinery or wielding powerful spells, Our flagship pack FTB Evolution has something new in sto

name: FTB Unstable 1.21
description: The most up to date and hot off the press mods in all of Modern Minecraft for Unstable 1.21!

name: FTB NeoTech
description: A curated modpack for ambitious Technology players. Dive into Modern Industrialization, AE2, Immersive Engineering, Actually Additions, JustDireThings & Mekanism. Automate tasks, master resource production with Quarries, Chickens 2 and Equivalent Exchange

name: FTB Builders Paradise 2
description: Continuing its tradition, Builder's Paradise 2 stands in stark contrast to the technologically focused, goal-oriented skyblock packs of recent times. FTB proudly presents a pack that cherishes the beauty, freedom, and grandeur of modded Minecraft.

name: FTB Presents F.A.M
description: Shenanagins is happening again and it's STILL Abe's Fault! FTB has teamed up with twitch.tv/abe and other streamers to create an all new season 2 adventure pack focused on a long play modded experience with friends. Grab your pickaxes and hop in!

name: FTB Genesis
description: Suspended in a corrupt simulation, your people need you to restore Elyria's habitat free them from the decaying digital landscape. Mutated monsters and irradiated wastelands stand between you and the fate of a world on the precipice of extinction.

name: FTB Presents Direwolf20 1.20
description: Join Direwolf20 for an immersive Minecraft journey in the all-new 1.20 version of the FTB and Direwolf20 collaboration!

name: FTB Skies Expert
description: Welcome back aboard the FTB Airship, and get ready for a whole new Skies Adventure. You asked for it and now it's here; Skies Expert. We've re-tooled, revamped, and revved up the whole pack to give you the *expert-level* adventure you craved.

name: NeoForge
description: NeoForge

name: FTB Arcanum Institute
description: Experience a world of wonder and wizardry at The Arcanum Institute, where your magical journey awaits. Unearth arcane secrets, forge bonds with mystical creatures, and rise to the challenge of defeating an ancient darkness.

name: FTB Presents AbePack
description: Shenanagins is happening and it's Abe's Fault! FTB has teamed up with twitch.tv/abe and other streamers to create a fun new adventure pack focused on a long play modded experience with friends. Grab your pickaxes and hop in!

name: FTB Interactions Remastered

name: FTB Skies
description: FTB Skies is an immersive modpack that challenges you to survive, build and conquer obstacles on a unique floating island. With a perfect blend of magic and technology, quests, and custom events, the experience is unforgettable.

name: FTB Legend of the Eyes
description: Twelve eyes, scattered around the world. When brought together, they create a portal to unspeakable danger and adventure.

name: FTB Presents Direwolf20 1.19
description: FTB and Direwolf have a new and thrilling escapade in store for you! Since 2011, FTB and Direwolf20 have provided simple-yet-unique kitchen-sink-type modpacks suitable for every skill level. Now, 1.19 is here and it's better than ever!

name: FTB StoneBlock 3
description: In a world surrounded by stone, build yourself a subterranean kingdom that really rocks! Use magic and technology to forge your realm to your designs.

name: FTB Inferno
description: A rite gone wrong, trapped in a dimension of fire and torment. Your only choice is to bend this world to your will... or be lost to the INFERNO

name: FTB One
description: Our fastest ever produced modpack, unique jigsaw-based world gen, from dungeons to hidden ore clusters. All on a new era of Minecraft, 1.19.

name: FTB Plexiglass Mountain
description: Plexiglass Mountain is a new freeplay kitchen-sink modpack by the FTB Team. With an optional quest-line, a vast variety of mods and unique custom structures generating throughout the world.
